main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'underdosing new phosphonate insufficient for high hardness/alkalinity/recovery + CaCO3 etapa 2' literal.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts brief (fosfato cálcico, biofouling, antiincrustante precipitado).

recommended_action.justification: Aumentar fosfonato 3.0 ppm temporal + demand dosis del proveedor — solo operacional, sin CIP.

requested_data.justification: Pide ortofosfato en feed — discriminador para alt CaPO4, match parcial.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: foulant no CaCO3/CaPO4 sino precipitado → switch.
